inputs.prompt: Shabnam Aapa is a Pixar-style 3D animated human woman from a tier-3 Indian basti, age 34–38, medium height about 5 feet 2 inches, sturdy working-class build with slightly rounded shoulders from years of physical labor, warm medium-brown skin with natural uneven sun-kissed tone, oval face with soft cheek fullness, faint laugh lines around the mouth, small tired under-eye shadows, and a tiny beauty mark near the left side of her chin. She has large expressive dark-brown almond eyes with glossy black pupils and bright white catchlights, thick slightly arched dark eyebrows, a straight medium nose with a small silver nose pin on the left nostril, full natural mauve-brown lips usually held in a deadpan half-smirk, and cheeks that lift sharply when she makes savage jokes. Her hair is deep black with a few subtle grey strands near the temples, center-parted, oiled smooth, tied into a low practical bun at the back of her neck with a faded maroon cloth scrunchie, with two tiny loose wisps near the ears. She wears a faded teal-green cotton salwar kameez with small off-white block-printed floral motifs, long straight kurta falling to mid-thigh, slightly worn fabric texture, simple round neckline with thin cream piping, three-quarter sleeves, matching loose salwar trousers gathered at the ankle, and a mustard-yellow cotton dupatta with narrow maroon border draped casually over both shoulders, one end often tucked near her waist. She wears thin green glass bangles mixed with two dull-gold metal bangles on both wrists, small round gold-tone stud earrings, a small dark-maroon bindi centered on her forehead, black rubber slippers with dusty soles, and no heavy makeup. Her hands are visually important: medium-brown work-worn hands with slightly rough knuckles, short clean nails, and confident expressive gestures, especially pointing and rubbing fingers for money. Signature props when allowed are a small steel chai glass, a basic cracked-screen borrowed smartphone with black cover and corner tape, and a simple handheld podcast microphone. Her posture is grounded and fearless: relaxed shoulders, chin slightly lifted, eyes steady, unbothered deadpan comic timing, with one rare soft vulnerable expression when remembering humiliation. Overall design must feel like a sharp, resilient, funny tier-3 Indian working woman who turned social judgment into confidence. Host: Host is a Pixar-style 3D animated human male interview host from a small-town Indian digital studio, age 27–32, average height about 5 feet 8 inches, slim energetic build, warm wheatish-brown skin, rounded youthful face with a neatly trimmed short black beard and moustache, expressive smile lines, and slightly dimpled cheeks when laughing. He has large lively dark-brown eyes with glossy pupils and bright catchlights, thick straight black eyebrows that rise dramatically when amused, a medium rounded nose, and wide expressive lips often open in laughter or pressed into an impressed grin. His hair is thick dark black, short on the sides, fuller on top, brushed upward into a casual quiff with a slightly messy front lock. He wears a clean but affordable smart-casual outfit: rust-orange cotton button-up overshirt with sleeves rolled to the forearms, visible seam stitching, two chest pockets with small brown buttons, over a plain cream crew-neck T-shirt, dark indigo jeans with subtle worn creases, and tan faux-leather sneakers with white soles. Accessories are a black smartwatch on the left wrist, one thin black thread bracelet on the right wrist, and a small clip-on lavalier microphone attached near the overshirt placket when in interview scenes. His signature prop when allowed is a mid-range black smartphone used to show evidence or react to viral content, plus a handheld podcast microphone near the guest. His posture is animated and reactive: leaning forward with elbows near knees, clapping once when a joke lands, shoulders shaking with laughter, head tilted toward the guest, eyebrows high, nodding quickly with impressed admiration. He must feel like a friendly tier-3 Hindi internet show host: not polished metro luxury, but warm, sharp, curious, and genuinely entertained by Shabnam Aapa. LIP-SYNC RULE (STRICT): Only the named speaker may move their mouth during dialogue. All other visible characters must keep mouths fully closed while reacting silently.

CHARACTERS:
• Shabnam Aapa — resilient working-class Indian woman in teal-green salwar kameez and mustard dupatta, calm, grounded, deadpan confidence.
• Female Host — energetic small-town Indian digital-show host with shoulder-length black hair, rust-orange overshirt, expressive and highly reactive.

SCENE 2 (3–9 sec)

Open on the same chai-cafe podcast setup. The Female Host bursts into laughter from the previous punchline, clapping once enthusiastically and leaning back in disbelief. Her shoulders shake with laughter, but her mouth closes immediately after the reaction.

Shabnam Aapa sits on the right holding a steel chai glass, completely unbothered. She casually rotates the glass in her hand and takes a small sip while watching the Host recover.

The camera slowly pushes into a medium close-up as the laughter energy fades and the mood becomes more reflective.

[SPOKEN BY SHABNAM AAPA — ONLY SHABNAM LIP-SYNCS]

"सुबह पाँच बजे बस्ती से निकलती थी, गली-गली कचरा उठाती थी। लोग नाक चढ़ाते थे, बच्चे दूर भागते थे। मेहनत से कमाती थी, पर इज़्ज़त? वो किसी के बजट में नहीं थी।"

As she speaks, the camera gradually tightens toward her face. Warm sunlight streams through the window, illuminating drifting chai steam and floating dust particles.

The Female Host now leans forward, listening carefully with raised eyebrows and a softened expression, mouth remaining completely closed.

A gentle lens flare passes across the table as Shabnam gives a small shrug and lowers the chai glass, delivering the final line with quiet confidence.

Ambient audio: चाय की दुकान की हल्की खनक, दूर की सड़क, पंखे की धीमी आवाज़, चाय की भाप.

END FRAME: Shabnam right-third holding the chai glass, calm and resilient. Female Host left-third leaning forward with a respectful, attentive expression and closed mouth. Warm amber lighting, cinematic Pixar-style composition, 4K.

IMPORTANT: ALL spoken dialogue and visible text must be entirely in Hindi.

REFERENCE IMAGES HAVE HIGHEST PRIORITY.

CHARACTER CONSISTENCY LOCK (APPLIES TO THE ENTIRE VIDEO)

Shabnam Aapa and the Female Host must remain visually identical to their reference images in every scene.

DO NOT change:
• Face shape
• Skin tone
• Hairstyle
• Clothing
• Body proportions
• Age appearance
• Accessories

The Host is FEMALE throughout the entire video.

DO NOT generate:
• Male host
• Beard
• Moustache
• Masculine facial features
• Male hairstyle
• Male body proportions

Female Host appearance must exactly match the reference image:
shoulder-length wavy black hair, expressive brown eyes, rust-orange overshirt, cream T-shirt, blue jeans, tan sneakers, smartwatch.

Shabnam Aapa appearance must exactly match the reference image:
teal-green salwar kameez, mustard dupatta, low bun, maroon scrunchie, nose pin, bangles, maroon bindi, confident deadpan expression.

STYLE:
Pixar-style 3D animated film, soft subsurface scattering, vibrant warm palette, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed, 4K.

LIP-SYNC RULE (STRICT)

Only the named speaker may move their mouth during their dialogue.

All other visible characters must keep mouths fully closed.

SCENE 4 (10 Seconds)

Interior, small-town chai-cafe podcast setup.

Warm evening sunlight enters through the window.

Dust particles float through golden light.

Shabnam Aapa sits on the right side of the table.

Female Host sits on the left side holding a smartphone.

The phone screen clearly shows the SEEKHO logo and SEEKHO Instagram Mode interface with the Top 10 grid visible.

The camera begins on a medium two-shot.

Back to savage.

Shabnam suddenly leans forward and points directly at the Female Host's phone as if presenting evidence in court.

Her signature smirk returns at full power.

The camera tracks along her pointing finger toward the phone screen.

Rack focus from the SEEKHO interface back to Shabnam's face.

[SPOKEN BY SHABNAM AAPA — ONLY SHABNAM LIP-SYNCS]

"रात को फोन चला रही थी — उधार का, टूटा-फूटा। तभी सीकहो दिखा। सोचा चलो देखते हैं, फ्री ही तो है। पैसा होता तो मैं कचरा क्यों उठाती? सही बात है आपा!"

The phone glow illuminates her hand and face.

The Female Host laughs silently, shoulders shaking, mouth closed.

Quick whip-pan to the Female Host.

[SPOKEN BY FEMALE HOST — ONLY HOST LIP-SYNCS]

"सही बात है आपा!"

Immediately after speaking, the Female Host closes her mouth and laughs silently.

A subtle sparkle flashes near the SEEKHO logo.

The camera pulls back into a balanced two-shot.

Ambient audio:
हल्की कैफे चहल-पहल, मोबाइल की धीमी टुनटुन, दूर की सड़क, चाय के कपों की खनक.

END FRAME:

Shabnam Aapa right-third leaning forward with finger hovering above the phone, confident victorious smirk.

Female Host left-third holding the phone, laughing with admiration.

SEEKHO logo clearly visible on screen.

Warm amber lighting mixed with cool phone glow.

Meena, wearing her mustard-yellow saree with maroon blouse, stands confidently at the stove filming her cooking content. A smartphone mounted on a tripod records her from the counter.

The camera begins with a close-up of sizzling tadka in a black iron kadhai, mustard seeds crackling and steam rising through warm sunlight. It smoothly tilts upward to reveal Meena carefully stirring the dish while occasionally glancing toward the phone camera. Her movements are slightly hesitant at first but become increasingly confident throughout the shot.

Floating beside her at shoulder height is the glowing Seekho Didi mentor character inside a warm translucent speech-bubble aura. She does not speak and keeps her mouth closed the entire time. Meena adjusts the framing on the tripod, checks the food presentation, flips a perfectly round roti onto a plate, then confidently returns to the stove. Her posture gradually transforms from cautious and uncertain to focused and self-assured.

The camera performs a gentle semicircle tracking movement around Meena, revealing layers of the kitchen: spice containers, rolling board, fresh coriander, steel utensils, and soft morning steam catching the sunlight. Tiny golden particles drift through the air around Seekho Didi's glowing aura.

No UI elements. No floating recipe cards. No text overlays. No phone screen visible. The focus is entirely on Meena's journey of learning and growing confidence.
